headline: Is Darling Ingredients Inc. (DAR) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is DAR a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Darling Ingredients Inc. on Valueinvestorsclub.com by FreeFlow. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on DAR. Darling Ingredients Inc.’s share was trading at $60.34 as of June 2nd. DAR’s trailing and forward P/E were 43.80 and 17.12 respectively according to Yahoo […]

headline: A Look At Valero Energy (VLO) Valuation As Strong Earnings Hopes Clash With Insider Selling Concerns
summary: Valero Energy (VLO) is back in focus after its stock outpaced the market, supported by very strong earnings expectations and a top analyst rating, even as some investors flag stretched valuations and recent insider selling. See our latest analysis for Valero Energy. At a share price of US$255.82, Valero Energy has recently pulled back slightly after a strong run, with a 90 day share price return of 18.46% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 104.41%. This suggests momentum has been strong...

headline: What Energy Markets Got Right—and Wrong—100 Days Into the Iran War
summary: The global energy state of play 100 days into the worst supply shock in modern history has confounded analysts and investors alike.
